incident: Address has no activity on target chain: Address has zero transactions (sent or received) on the target chain
label: H1_positive

incident: Address has no activity on target chain: Same address has transaction history on at least one other EVM chain
label: H1_positive

incident: Address has no activity on target chain: User has previously sent to this address on a different chain
label: H1_positive

incident: Address has no activity on target chain: User followed recommendation -- Confirm the intended chain with the recipient. Address exists on other networks but not this one.
label: H1_clean

incident: Contract address cannot receive tokens: Contract bytecode has no receive() or fallback() function for ETH transfers
label: H2_positive

incident: Contract address cannot receive tokens: Contract does not implement ERC-721/1155 receiver interface for NFT transfers
label: H2_positive

incident: Contract address cannot receive tokens: User followed recommendation -- Prevent transaction -- tokens would be permanently locked in the contract
label: H2_clean

incident: Address poisoning: Recipient matches first 4 and last 4 characters of a different address the user previously interacted with
label: H3_positive

incident: Address poisoning: User received a dust transaction (<$0.01) from an address visually similar to the recipient
label: H3_positive

incident: Address poisoning: Recipient address was created very recently (< 7 days) and has only dust transactions
label: H3_positive

incident: Address poisoning: User followed recommendation -- Block transaction and show the legitimate address alongside the poisoned one for comparison
label: H3_clean

incident: Chain ID mismatch: Transaction chain ID does not match the RPC endpoint's reported chain ID
label: H4_positive

incident: Chain ID mismatch: User-selected network name resolves to a different chain ID than expected
label: H4_positive

incident: Chain ID mismatch: User followed recommendation -- Prevent transaction from being broadcast until chain ID is corrected
label: H4_clean

incident: Deprecated contract: Contract has a paused state variable set to true or circuit breaker is active
label: H5_positive

incident: Deprecated contract: Contract emitted a migration event or has a successor address registered
label: H5_positive

incident: Deprecated contract: Contract has had no transactions in 90+ days and no governance activity
label: H5_positive

incident: Deprecated contract: User followed recommendation -- Look up the new contract address and redirect the transaction to the migrated version
label: H5_clean
